---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Education</h2>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Master of Public Health (MPH), Epidemiology</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">Expected May 2026</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Certificate in Data Science</li>
    <li>Coursework: Statistical Programming (SAS &amp; R), Epidemiology, Data Visualization, Descriptive Statistics, Machine Learning, Python Programming, Data Visualization in Public Health, SQL, GIS (Geographic Information Systems)</li>
  </ul>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Master of Business Administration, Pharmaceutical Technology</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2022</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">SVKM NMIMS SPTM University &middot; Mumbai, India</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Coursework: Business Analytics, Project Management, Supply Chain, Mergers and Acquisitions, Sales &amp; Marketing</li>
  </ul>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Bachelor of Pharmacy</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2022</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">SVKM NMIMS SPTM University &middot; Mumbai, India</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Coursework: Pharmacokinetics, Pharmacovigilance, Pharmacology, Molecule Designing, Regulatory Affairs</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Professional Experience</h2>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Graduate Research Assistant — HRSA-Funded HIV Stigma Reduction Initiative</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">January 2026 &ndash; Present</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Support a multi-year HRSA-funded research initiative addressing HIV stigma in healthcare settings</li>
    <li>Conducted systematic review screening and structured data extraction using Covidence</li>
    <li>Evaluated evidence on interventions designed to reduce HIV stigma among healthcare providers</li>
    <li>Align evidence synthesis and documentation with HRSA federal workplan and reporting requirements</li>
  </ul>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Applied Practice Experience — CHIMES HIV Stigma Metrics Project</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">June 2025 &ndash; September 2025</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">Center for HIV and Mental Health Stigma Elimination Strategies (CHIMES), Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health &middot; Remote</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Selected for a prestigious APE at the world's #1-ranked public health school (USA &amp; globally)</li>
    <li>Led project: "Innovative development of an expanded, robust repository of attribute-specific and intersectional stigma metrics"</li>
    <li>Designed and implemented reproducible R pipelines for psychometric validation of HIV-related stigma scales across multiple populations</li>
    <li>Computed descriptive statistics, item distributions, and Cronbach's alpha for large survey datasets</li>
    <li>Developed modular, reusable scripts to support scalable analysis of multiple stigma instruments</li>
    <li>Executed systematic literature searches in PubMed, Embase, CINAHL, and PsycINFO using MeSH/Emtree terms</li>
  </ul>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Graduate Research Assistant — PRISM HIV Prevention Team</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">April 2025 &ndash; Present</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">Department of Epidemiology, Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University &middot; Atlanta, GA</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Secured a competitive GRA position supporting the PRISM team on HIV prevention research</li>
    <li>Maintain and update the U.S. PrEP Locator database covering 3,000+ providers nationwide, ensuring data accuracy and improved accessibility of HIV prevention services</li>
  </ul>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Senior Executive — Portfolio Management &amp; Business Development (U.S. Market)</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">October 2022 &ndash; July 2024</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">Zydus Lifesciences &middot; Gujarat, India</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Identified and profiled 25+ therapeutic indications in the U.S. market, providing overviews of disease epidemiology, treatment algorithms, pipelines, competitive intelligence, and unmet needs</li>
    <li>Evaluated quarterly pipelines of ~45 branded companies to identify early-stage products for development, label expansion, and new formulations</li>
    <li>Facilitated portfolio analysis, product nominations, and oversaw completion of PIFs for topical, oral liquid, nasal, and injectable products</li>
    <li>Monitored ANDA and NDA approvals monthly, evaluating product competition and new nominations using the IMS database</li>
    <li>Mapped competitive landscape for products under development; prepared reports for annual R&amp;D meetings and quarterly planning</li>
    <li>Monitored new developments from FDA releases, clinical trial data, and company press releases to enhance competitive intelligence</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Research &amp; Data Science Projects</h2>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Reproducible Data Science Pipeline for HIV Epidemiology — Children &amp; Adolescents</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">August 2025 &ndash; December 2025</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">Emory University, RSPH &middot; R, Docker, GitHub, Makefile, renv</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Built an end-to-end reproducible data analysis pipeline using UNAIDS HIV epidemiology data for children and adolescents (ages 0–19)</li>
    <li>Conducted descriptive epidemiologic analysis and time-trend visualization of HIV incidence (2000–2020)</li>
    <li>Automated report generation using Makefile-driven workflows, producing tables, figures, and a publication-ready HTML report</li>
    <li>Containerized the analytical environment using Docker to ensure cross-platform reproducibility</li>
    <li>Implemented dependency management with renv; published and validated a public Docker Hub image</li>
  </ul>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-title">Capstone Research: Routine Immunization Disruptions &amp; Vaccine-Preventable Disease Trends</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">January 2026 &ndash; May 2026</span>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-entry-org">Emory University, RSPH &middot; Epidemiologic Analysis (CARE-Supported Districts, 2024–2025)</div>
  <ul class="cv-bullets">
    <li>Analyzed surveillance and immunization datasets across CARE-supported governorates to evaluate changes in VPD incidence</li>
    <li>Assessed ecological associations between measles incidence and measles-rubella vaccination delivery using facility-level data</li>
    <li>Examined trends across 399 VPD cases (measles, mumps, pertussis, hepatitis A/B, chickenpox)</li>
    <li>Produced epidemiologic report and poster presentation summarizing findings for academic review</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Skills</h2>

  <p><strong>Statistical Methods</strong></p>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <span class="skill-tag">Regression Modeling</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Survival Analysis</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Hypothesis Testing</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Psychometric Validation</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Descriptive Epidemiology</span>
  </div>

  <p><strong>Programming &amp; Data Analysis</strong></p>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <span class="skill-tag">R</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">SAS</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
  </div>

  <p><strong>Data Science &amp; Reproducibility</strong></p>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <span class="skill-tag">Git &amp; GitHub</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Docker</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Makefile</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">renv</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">R Markdown</span>
  </div>

  <p><strong>Spatial &amp; Public Health Analytics</strong></p>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <span class="skill-tag">ArcGIS Pro</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">R-based Spatial Analysis</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Spatial Statistics</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Geospatial Visualization</span>
  </div>

  <p><strong>Research &amp; Data Tools</strong></p>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <span class="skill-tag">PubMed</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Embase</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">CINAHL</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">PsycINFO</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">REDCap</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Covidence</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Elicit</span>
  </div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Certifications</h2>
  <div class="award-item">&#127941; Certified in Human Subjects Protection &mdash; CITI Program</div>
  <div class="award-item">&#127941; Certificate in Data Science &mdash; Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University</div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Download</h2>
  <p>
    <a href="Akanshya_Dash_Resume.pdf" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block; background:#1b2a6b; color:#fff; padding:0.55rem 1.3rem; border-radius:6px; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;">
      <i class="fas fa-file-pdf"></i>&nbsp; Download Full CV (PDF)
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
```
